issues.description: Targeted Vitest execution could not start in this read-only sandbox because esbuild spawn failed with EPERM while loading vitest.config.ts. Direct code review and `npx tsc --noEmit` passed, but the requested route/unit test reproduction was not measurable here.
issues.recommendation: Re-run the targeted Vitest command, or the full `npx vitest run`, in a normal writable/dev environment to confirm the 39 new tests pass.
issues.deferRationale: Blocked by sandbox process-spawn permission, not by the implementation under review.
